case_title: PARKMERCED COMPANY, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP vs. ADAMS, ANTHONY

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED COMPANY, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT ADAMS, ANTHONY SUMMONS ISSUED
